Reproducibility notes for this demo evaluation
10 sequential POST requests to /api/rag/recommend on localhost; API route used because it is faster and more reproducible than browser clicking.
All requests explicitly used deepseek-v4-flash with thinking=disabled. parserMode had to equal deepseek.
Every response had to report retrieval=vector, provider=ollama, model=nomic-embed-text. Mixed local/Gemini vector rows are a hard failure.
Ollama runs on the user's RTX 5090 machine over Tailscale. The workbook intentionally omits API keys and secrets.

100–120% budget, deterministic WARNING, or defensible multi-workload classification difference.

The first run is preserved in rag-demo-results-before-fixes.json. Fixes added hard capacity filtering, general SFF filtering, PSU pool coverage, and CPU/motherboard budget downgrades.
